title: Nested SELECT expression with JOIN causes outer WHERE to be disregarded sometimes
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t1 (a Int32, b Int32, c String);
CREATE TABLE t2 (c Int32, d Float32, e Date);
SELECT * FROM (SELECT * FROM t1 JOIN t2 ON t1.a = t2.c) AS abc WHERE abc.a IS NOT NULL AND abc.b < 5;
key_bug_features: Nested SELECT with JOIN disregards outer WHERE clause
